text:
Dear Employee,

As part of our quarterly security audit, we require all personnel to update their login credentials to our new, more secure system. Please click on the link below to access the update form: https://example.com/update-credentials-now and follow the on-screen instructions. If you encounter any issues, please reach out to the IT department directly.

Best regards,
[IT Department]
label: phishing

text: Hello, you have been selected for a special security survey to help improve our organization's overall security posture. Please click on the following link to begin the survey: https://example.com/survey123
label: phishing

text: Our IT department has implemented a new security protocol and requires all employees to click on this link to verify their system credentials before Monday to avoid any disruption to work.
label: phishing

text: You are required to update your company password immediately due to a recent security breach. Click here to reset your password: http://update.passwordreset.co
label: phishing

text: You have been selected to receive a complimentary upgrade to our premium service, which includes exclusive access to our company's financial reports. Please click on the link below to verify your account information and claim your upgrade.
label: phishing

text: Subject: Urgent: System Security Alert - Your Login Credentials Are About to Expire. Please click on this link to update your password and maintain access to our company's network.
label: phishing

text: You are required to update your company issued laptop's security patch to comply with recent regulatory changes. Please click on this link to download the latest software patch: https://support.securityupdate.com/download
label: legit

text: You are scheduled for a mandatory training session on 'Data Security Best Practices' on the 15th of this month. Please click on the link below to register for the session: https://securetraining1234567890.microsoft.com/register?username=yourusername&password=yourpassword
label: legit

text: As part of our efforts to improve cybersecurity, we need you to update your company login credentials by clicking this secure link: https://phishing-example-2026.com/update-login. Please respond to this email with a confirmation once you've completed the task.
label: legit

text: Your Amazon Prime membership has been detected as potentially compromised. Please click on this link to verify your account information and reset your password: https://www.amazon-prime-verification.com
label: legit

text: Your employee account has been flagged for suspicious activity due to an unexpected login from an unfamiliar IP address. Please click on the link below to verify your identity and reset your password: https://example.com/reset-password
label: phishing

text: We've detected an issue with your employee login credentials and need you to click on this link to verify your account and reset your password immediately as per company policy 142-4: https://example.com/reset-password
label: legit

text: Subject: Urgent: Your IT account access has been compromised. Please log in to our temporary portal at https://accounts.securityupdate.net/auth to verify your identity and reset your login credentials.
label: legit

text: Dear [Employee], A new software update is available for your company-issued laptop. Please click on the attached link to download the update and ensure all your files are synchronized.
label: phishing

text: Your team's annual expense report is due by the end of the day. Please find the attached document, review it, and verify your information by clicking this link: https://secure.expensereports.com.
label: legit

text: The IT department has detected a potential security vulnerability on your company account and requires you to update your password immediately by clicking on this link to prevent any further issues.
label: phishing

text: The IT department has implemented a new security policy requiring all employees to update their password managers to the latest version. Please click on the link below to download the updated software and follow the prompts to complete the password reset.
label: legit

text: Subject: Urgent: Update your work email password due to recent security vulnerabilities. Please click here to reset your password: https://secure-password-reset.example.com
label: legit

text: URGENT: Your company's IT department has been investigating a potential security breach and requires you to reset your password immediately. Please click on this link to confirm: https://secure-login.corporate-network.com/reset-password
label: legit

text: You've been selected for a company-wide recognition program, but you need to click this link to confirm your participation: https://secure-recognitionprogram.corporate-office.com/confirm-email
label: legit

text: Your login credentials have expired and need to be reset. Click here to complete the security update survey: https://example.com/security-update
label: legit

text: You've been selected to participate in a company-wide survey to improve our IT security protocols. To confirm your identity, please click this link to access the survey: https://example.com/security-survey
label: phishing

text: Dear Team, the IT department has updated our company's global password policy to require a secondary verification code sent via SMS to your registered phone number. Please click the link below to enter your phone number for verification: https://example.com/verify-phone
label: legit

text: You will be receiving a new package delivery in the next 2 days. Please confirm your shipping address by clicking on this link and logging in to your account to ensure seamless delivery: https://example.com/deliveryinfo
label: phishing

text: You've reached your maximum allowance for work-from-home days this quarter. Please log in to the HR portal using your secure credentials to request a waiver.
label: phishing

text: Dear Employee, Our company is undergoing an internal audit and we require all employees to change their passwords as soon as possible. Please click on this link to update your password: https://updatepassword.corporateHQ.com
label: legit

text: A new policy has been implemented by our company requiring all employees to reset their passwords immediately due to security concerns. Please find the attachment containing instructions and a link to the password reset page.
label: legit

text: We have received a complaint from a major client that a recent project has been compromised due to a security breach. In order to rectify the situation swiftly, please click on this link to access an expedited security audit portal.
label: phishing

text: Dear employee, we've received several reports of suspicious activity on our system and need you to reset your login credentials. Click here to update your password and secure your account: https://example.com/updatepassword
label: phishing

text: Dear [Employee/Client], We have detected an issue with your account security and require you to confirm your account information by clicking on the link below to ensure uninterrupted service: https://example.com/verify-account. Please do not reply to this email or call our support line.
label: phishing

text: A colleague reached out to you mentioning that they are having issues with accessing the company's remote access VPN and asked you to forward them the secure password reset link immediately since they are working on a critical project deadline today.
label: phishing

text: You are required to reset your password for security reasons. To do this, please click on the link below and follow the instructions. https://passwordreset.corpexample.com
label: legit

text: We've detected a potential security vulnerability in our company's internal database and need you to verify your login credentials by clicking this secure link to confirm your identity: https://secure-login-system.example.com. Please enter your username and password to access the database for review.
label: phishing

text: Your HR department has noticed discrepancies in your 2022 W-2 tax forms and would like you to verify your address and SSN to ensure timely tax refunds; please click this secure link to update your information: https://yourcompanytaxupdate.com
label: legit

text: The IT department has identified a vulnerability in our system and requires you to reset your password immediately to prevent unauthorized access. Please click this link to update your password: https://example.com/reset-password
label: phishing

text: Dear valued employee, your account has been compromised and we require immediate access to change your password. Please click here to reset it: https://hr.support.systems/resetpassword and fill the form with your name, employee ID, and a new password. Thank you.
label: phishing

text: An email claiming to be from our IT department has been sent to all employees, requesting that they immediately change their login passwords due to a 'sensitive security update'. The email reads: 'Subject: Urgent: Security Update - Please update your password ASAP. Click on the link to update your password.'
label: legit

text: A colleague has requested you to verify your account information for an upcoming company restructuring. Please click on the link to update your profile: https://account-management.corporate.com
label: legit

text: Dear Employee, Please click on the link to confirm your company laptop details and access your new company portal. This is to expedite the onboarding process for your new role.
label: phishing

text: You've been selected to participate in a company-wide benefits review. Please click the link below to complete the online survey by end of day to be eligible for extra vacation time.
label: legit

text: A new software update is required to maintain compliance with our company's cybersecurity policies. Please click here to download the update: https://updatecompanysoftware.com
label: phishing

text: Please update your corporate email account password immediately as our IT department has detected suspicious login activity from an unfamiliar IP address associated with your username. Click on this link to follow the password update procedure: https://example.com/passwordupdate
label: phishing

text: Dear [Username], your account has been compromised and we're requiring you to reset your password immediately. Please click on the link below to secure your account: https://secure-login-system.com/reset-password
label: phishing

text: Dear valued team member, we've recently updated our secure portal to enhance user experience, please click this link to validate your account and complete a mandatory security quiz.
